compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect conditional security and performance review overlays

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md, and related docs to reflect overlay architecture.
**Why**: Ensures future agents have accurate awareness of the overlay system.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (overlay dispatch, agent definitions, severity rules), REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (parallel/serial triggering flow), quick reference table
- OUT: New documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md reflects the overlay dispatch logic, agent definitions, and severity rules
- When this story is complete, REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md documents the parallel/serial overlay triggering flow and graceful degradation behavior


## Notes

**2026-03-22T06:47:48Z**

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
